title: Fulbright Scholarship - USA 2026
excerpt: Prestigious scholarship for Pakistani students to study in USA universities.
eligibility: Bachelor's degree completed. Age 25-45 years. TOEFL scores required. English proficiency.
applyProcess:
1. Take TOEFL/IELTS exam
2. Visit USEFP website
3. Submit application online
4. Prepare for interviews
5. Await selection
seoDescription: Apply for prestigious Fulbright scholarship to study in USA. Check eligibility and requirements.

title: Commonwealth Scholarship - UK 2026
excerpt: Full funding scholarship for Masters and PhD students from Commonwealth countries.
eligibility: Bachelor's degree from recognized university. Age under 35 years for Masters. English proficiency.
applyProcess:
1. Check eligible programs
2. Apply through university
3. University submits to CSC
4. Wait for selection
5. Get visa support
seoDescription: Commonwealth scholarship for Masters and PhD. Full funding from UK government. Apply now.
